things.name: Milan Cathedral (Duomo) & Rooftop
things.description: The world's largest Gothic cathedral — walk among its 135 spires on the extraordinary rooftop terrace

things.name: The Last Supper (Santa Maria delle Grazie)
things.description: Leonardo da Vinci's 1495 masterpiece mural — book months ahead for the strictly timed visit

things.name: Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
things.description: Italy's oldest and most beautiful shopping gallery (1877) — the Milan equivalent of Harrods

things.name: Pinacoteca di Brera
things.description: One of Italy's finest art collections in an 18th-century palazzo — Raphael, Caravaggio and Mantegna

things.name: Quadrilatero della Moda
things.description: The Fashion Quadrilateral — Via della Spiga, Via Montenapoleone and the global fashion capitals

things.name: Navigli Canals District
things.description: Leonardo da Vinci's 15th-century canal network — now lined with vintage bars and aperitivo restaurants

things.name: Castello Sforzesco
things.description: Vast 15th-century Sforza fortress with Michelangelo's last sculpture, the Rondanini Pieta

things.name: MUDEC Museum of Cultures
things.description: World cultures museum in a striking contemporary building with rotating blockbuster exhibitions

things.name: AC Milan / Inter Milan Stadium Tour (San Siro)
things.description: The legendary double-ringed San Siro — museum and ground tour of one of football's greatest cathedrals

things.name: Lake Como Day Trip
things.description: The world's most glamorous lake 50 km north — George Clooney's villa, Bellagio and ferry tours
